blocks.speaker: Coach Briggs
blocks.content: Full contact drill. Nobody's protecting you out there on game day. Don't practice soft.
Marcus lined up against me on the first rep. He had six inches and forty pounds on me and he knew exactly what he was doing with both.
He hit me at the line and I went down clean.
Second rep. Same thing. Down again.
Third rep. Marcus came off the line and I didn't try to go around him — I went through him, low, shoulder first. He still moved me. But not as far.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: That's how you respond to getting hit. You get smarter, not harder.
He said it like a lesson he'd already learned. I wondered who taught it to him and when.
